name: single_arm_0001
prompt: The robotic gripper uses the white brush it is holding to clean the bathtub.
prompt detailed: The robot, situated in a bathroom with wooden flooring and a towel hanging nearby, uses the white brush held by its gripper to thoroughly clean the surface of the bathtub, ensuring all areas are properly scrubbed. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic gripper picks up the lid from the blue towel and puts it on the pot.
prompt detailed: In a kitchen setting with a round black table and visible appliances, the robotic gripper carefully picks up the glass lid resting on the blue towel and gently places it on top of the stainless steel pot positioned on the same table. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic gripper picks up the red-orange flower from the table and hands it to the person standing in front.

name: single_arm_0016
prompt: The robotic gripper picks up the red marker from the green mug.
prompt detailed: In a lab-like workspace featuring a white table marked with blue tape, the robotic gripper carefully retrieves the red marker from inside the green mug placed on the table. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic gripper pick up the pen from the yellow mug.

prompt: The robotic gripper picks up the small bottle from the table.

prompt: The robotic gripper picks up the pen from the table and places it on the white paper.

name: single_arm_0080
prompt: The robotic gripper moves the green marker to the left of the green mug on the wooden table.
prompt detailed: The robotic gripper, operating in a well-lit indoor workspace with a wooden floor and various equipment, carefully moves the green marker and places it to the left side of the green mug on the wooden table. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic gripper picks up the marker and places it inside the black mug.

prompt: The robotic gripper places the small black mug into the tray.
